name: Italian Hot Cocoa
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the cocoa powder, sugar, and cornstarch in a saucepan with 1/4 cup of water.
2. Heat over medium heat, stirring constantly until the mixture comes to a boil.
3. Add 2 cups of liquid (water, brewed coffee, skim milk) to the saucepan and stir until heated through and mixed.
Note: This recipe produces a thick, rich hot cocoa that is not suitable for children but provides a highly chocolate-concentrated experience with minimal calories and fat from the cocoa used.
